name: Twinned Spell
requirement: The spell must target only one creature and must not have a range of Self.
description: When you cast a spell that targets only one creature and doesn't have a range of Self, you can spend a number of sorcery points equal to the spell's level to target a second creature in range with the same spell (minimum 1 sorcery point if the spell is a cantrip).

name: Quickened Spell
requirement: The spell must have a casting time of 1 action.
description: When you cast a spell that has a casting time of 1 action, you can spend 2 sorcery points to change the casting time to 1 bonus action for this casting. You can't modify a spell this way if you've already cast a spell of 1st level or higher on the current turn, nor can you cast such a spell on this turn after using Quickened Spell.
